mail_test_subtitle01: Newbie Survival Supplies Delivered — Your First Step in the Wasteland
mail_test_mailcontent01:
Hello, new Survivor:

By the time you receive this mail, you have already crossed the first line between life and death after the Cataclysm. You are now a new force of hope in this wasteland. I am a liaison from "Dawn Shelter" and have witnessed countless newcomers like you.
mail_test_subtitle02: Newbie Combat Supplies Released — Gear Up for Battle
mail_test_mailcontent02:
Hello, new Survivor!

The Cataclysm has struck and order is no more. Only by fighting can you survive. This is the Frontline Operations Base. We have prepared basic weapons and survival supplies to help you face danger and carve your path.

Stay armed, stay alert. Survival is the only victory!
— Frontline Operations Base
hero_equip_desc_000: Equip gear to enhance Hero stats!
hero_equip_desc_501: An ultimate experimental weapon left behind at an Arctic military base. The barrel is permanently enchanted with cryogenic energy, and every bullet carries absolute zero temperatures, instantly freezing zombie flesh and nerves.
hero_equip_desc_502: Legendary armor forged from a millennium-old glacier core and titanium alloy. Its surface is covered by an ever-frozen ice shield that can withstand any zombie bite and mutant acid attack.
hero_equip_desc_503: An energy chip extracted from "The Ice Nest Queen" — the strongest Polar mutant. It contains the glacial power of an entire ice field, drastically amplifying all Hero skill effects.
hero_equip_desc_504: The last remnants of a Coalition space radar, retrofitted by survivor scientists. It penetrates blizzards and permafrost to detect zombie nests and hidden resource points within dozens of kilometers.
hero_equip_desc_401: A modified military special forces shotgun equipped with a liquid nitrogen injector. At close range it fires deadly ice pellets that freeze zombies solid before shattering them.
hero_equip_desc_402: A top-tier Arctic research team cold-weather suit, reinforced with ballistic fibers and bite-resistant coating. Withstands -50°C extreme cold while blocking zombie claws and standard bullets.
hero_equip_desc_403: An energy chip crafted from mutated ice worm ganglia, delivering stable cryogenic energy. Greatly boosts Hero Attack and Critical Rate, with a chance to freeze enemies on hit.
hero_equip_desc_404: An advanced radar repurposed from an abandoned weather station. Monitors blizzard movement and intensity in real time, and detects nearby survivor camps and zombie horde movement.
hero_equip_desc_301: A machete forged from car spring steel. The blade is quench-hardened and coated with anti-freeze lubricant, staying sharp and rust-free in icy conditions.
hero_equip_desc_302: A tactical vest made from layered cold-weather fabric and discarded bulletproof vests. Features multiple storage pockets for ammunition and survival supplies.
hero_equip_desc_303: An energy chip salvaged from a discarded refrigerator compressor. Though its output is unstable, it effectively boosts Hero attack speed and movement speed.
hero_equip_desc_304: A basic radar rigged from an old phone and radio. Detects zombie activity at short range — low precision, but invaluable in low-visibility blizzards.
hero_equip_desc_201: A fire axe found in an abandoned fire station. Rusty on the surface, but still sturdy and durable — a go-to melee weapon for new survivors.
hero_equip_desc_202: An old cold-weather coat found in an abandoned house. Despite multiple tears, it still provides basic warmth — better than freezing in a blizzard.
hero_equip_desc_203: A simple energy device made from scavenged flashlight batteries wired in series. Provides a faint energy boost — better than nothing for a fresh Hero.
hero_equip_desc_204: A simple signal device made from cans and wire. Only receives very weak radio signals — occasionally picks up other survivors' distress calls. Barely any detection capability.
